label: Quick Access — phone-app launcher tiles
items: The four mobile shortcuts now look and feel like phone app icons — solid coloured tiles with a big white icon and a bold title.
Each one has its own signature colour so you can pick them out at a glance: Visual Lens in Rhozly forest green, Today in amber, Quick Capture in rose, The Library in indigo.
Cleaner layout, less whitespace, modernised lift on tap.
